title: tanacetum elongatum
intro: Tanacetum elongatum, also known as Tansy, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tanacetum elongatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum elongatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
